---
title: "final-project-rshiny"
author: "Christine"
date: "2026-05-06"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(DESeq2)

# Load raw counts
counts_raw <- read_tsv("GSE64810_raw_counts_GRCh38.p13_NCBI.tsv")

# Load annotation
annot <- read_tsv("Human.GRCh38.p13.annot.tsv")

# Pivot counts to long format
counts_long <- counts_raw %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = starts_with("GSM"),
    names_to = "accession",
    values_to = "counts"
  )

# Join counts with annotation
joined1 <- counts_long %>% left_join(annot, by = "GeneID")
```



```{r}
# read all lines from the file
lines <- readLines("GSE64810_series_matrix.txt")
title_line <- lines[grep("Sample_title", lines)]
age_line <- lines[grep("age of death", lines)]
pmi_line <- lines[grep("!Sample_characteristics.*pmi:", lines)]
rin_line <- lines[grep("!Sample_characteristics.*rin:", lines)]
accession_line <- lines[grep("Sample_geo_accession", lines)]

titles <- strsplit(title_line, "\t")[[1]]
accessions <- strsplit(accession_line, "\t")[[1]]

mapping <- data.frame(title = titles, accession = accessions)
mapping <- mapping[-1, ]

mapping$accession <- gsub("\"", "", mapping$accession)
# split and clean age, pmi, rin
ages <- strsplit(age_line, "\t")[[1]][-1]
pmis <- strsplit(pmi_line, "\t")[[1]][-1]
rins <- strsplit(rin_line, "\t")[[1]][-1]

# clean quotes and extract just the number
ages <- as.numeric(gsub(".*: |\"", "", ages))
pmis <- as.numeric(gsub(".*: |\"", "", pmis))
rins <- as.numeric(gsub(".*: |\"", "", rins))

# add to mapping
mapping$age_of_death <- ages
mapping$pmi <- pmis
mapping$rin <- rins
mapping$title <- gsub("\"", "", mapping$title)

# Add condition column
mapping <- mapping %>%
  mutate(condition = ifelse(startsWith(title, "C"), "Control", "Huntington's Disease"))

# Final join
joined_data <- joined1 %>% left_join(mapping, by = "accession")
```

Build the counts matrix

```{r}

#build coldata
coldata <- mapping %>% select(accession, title, condition, age_of_death, pmi, rin)

#manually doing column -> row names

rownames(coldata) <- coldata$accession
coldata$accession <- NULL

#back to wide format

counts_wide <- counts_long %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = accession,
    values_from = counts
  ) %>%
  column_to_rownames("GeneID")

counts_mat <- as.matrix(counts_wide)
storage.mode(counts_mat) <- "integer"
all(colnames(counts_mat) == rownames(coldata))

```

filter 
```{r}
control_samples <- rownames(coldata)[coldata$condition == "Control"]
counts_control <- counts_mat[, control_samples]
huntington_samples <- rownames(coldata)[coldata$condition == "Huntington's Disease"]
counts_hd <- counts_mat[, huntington_samples]

# count zeros per gene in each condition
zeros_control <- rowSums(counts_control == 0)
zeros_hd <- rowSums(counts_hd == 0)

# keep genes where fewer than half of samples in BOTH conditions are zero
keep <- zeros_control <= (ncol(counts_control) / 2) & 
        zeros_hd <= (ncol(counts_hd) / 2)

# apply filter
counts_filtered <- counts_mat[keep, ]

# check how many genes kept vs removed
cat("Genes before filtering:", nrow(counts_mat), "\n")
cat("Genes after filtering:", nrow(counts_filtered), "\n")
cat("Genes removed:", nrow(counts_mat) - nrow(counts_filtered))

```

```{r}
dds <- DESeqDataSetFromMatrix(countData = counts_filtered,
                              colData = coldata,
                              design= ~condition)

dds$condition <- relevel(dds$condition, ref = "Control")

dds <- DESeq(dds)
res <- results(dds, contrast = c("condition", "Huntington's Disease", "Control"))
summary(res)

```

```{r}
# convert to dataframe
res_df <- as.data.frame(res)
res_df$GeneID <- as.numeric(rownames(res_df))

# add gene symbols from annotation
res_df <- res_df %>%
  left_join(annot %>% select(GeneID, Symbol, Description), by = "GeneID")

# save
write.csv(res_df, "de_results.csv", row.names = FALSE)

vst_counts <- vst(dds, blind = FALSE)
norm_counts <- as.data.frame(assay(vst_counts))
norm_counts$GeneID <- as.numeric(rownames(norm_counts))
norm_counts <- norm_counts %>%
  left_join(annot %>% select(GeneID, Symbol), by = "GeneID")

write.csv(norm_counts, "normalized_counts.csv", row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(coldata, "sample_info.csv", row.names = TRUE)
```
